purpose: Chat history context for continuing work on a different machine (office PC). Read alongside progress_tracker.md and todo.md.
summary: Built and debugged the full SMS automation bridge: Node.js backend on Windows PC, Android gateway app on Samsung Galaxy A55, auto-discovery, dynamic gateway registration, and first successful end-to-end test in testDestination mode. Documentation updated for office handoff.

milestones.event: Android gateway project added; CI fix; initial APK build attempts
Fixed start-backend.bat, gateways.json, LAN IP scripts, firewall helper
Fixed discovery timeout/scan order (v1.2.1) — finds PC in ~0.2s
First full E2E test PASSED: REQ-20260610-0002-P94E → NEEDS_MANUAL_REVIEW + WhatsApp draft
All .md docs updated for office handoff; session context JSON created

testReplyPhone.role: Receives test SMS and sends manual operator-style reply

twoUrlRule.phoneToPc: http://<PC_LAN_IP>:3000 (Backend URL in app or auto-discovered)

networkUrls.officeNote: IPs will change on office Wi-Fi. Use start-backend.bat printed IP and app auto-discovery.

successfulE2eTest.inboundReplySample: GP LRL response with MSISDN, LACID, CellID, lat/long, address, CS/Volte status

failedOrSupersededTests.reason: SMS failed on A55 — default SMS SIM was slot 1 (Emergency only). Backend showed SENT because phone HTTP returns ok before carrier confirms.

issuesAndFixes.fix: foregroundServiceType dataSync/remoteMessaging; always startForeground(); notification fixes (v1.1.4)
BackendDiscovery v1.2.1: priority scan 200-254, 1s connect timeout, validate health JSON
Dual SIM: defaultSmsSubId pointed to dead SIM (Emergency only). User set SMS default to working GP SIM in phone Settings → SIM manager. TODO: SIM picker in app.
Removed comma inside gatewayUrl string; GP gatewayUrl empty for auto-register
Fixed CMD pipe bug; call npm start; auto-stop port 3000; pause on error

issuesAndFixes.issue: False positive SMS SENT in backend
issuesAndFixes.cause: SmsSender returns ok when queued to SmsManager, not when carrier delivers

whatsappBehavior.draftLocation: PC dashboard http://<PC_IP>:3000 → WhatsApp Replies section
whatsappBehavior.tagFormat: Plain text @RequesterName from app Settings → Test Metadata
whatsappBehavior.approveAction: POST /api/whatsapp-replies/:id/approve marks POSTED in backend only; manual copy/paste to WhatsApp

officePcChecklist: Run start-backend.bat — note new LAN IP
Phone and PC on same Wi-Fi
App: Backend connected (or set Backend URL manually)
Verify dashboard GP gatewayUrl shows phone IP:8080
Confirm default SMS SIM is working GP SIM (dual-SIM)
Optional: repeat Test Request E2E (backend restart wipes in-memory state)
nextPriorities: SIM slot picker in Android app
conversationTopics: APK v1.2.0 and v1.2.1 build and install
Backend running but app cannot find it — discovery timeout fix
What to do after backend connected
Message sent failed — dual SIM diagnosis
Which WhatsApp group gets draft (none auto-posted)
Update all .md files for office handoff
Push to git with session context JSON
